# `ta.dmi`

> **Stability:** stable
> **Since:** 0.2

Wilder's Directional Movement Index вҖ” `+DI` / `вҲ’DI` pair derived
from the Wilder-smoothed `+DM` / `вҲ’DM` over the smoothed True
Range. Reads `bar.high` / `bar.low` / `bar.close` directly
(mirrors Pine's `ta.dmi(length)` вҖ” no source param). Both series
вҲҲ [0, 100] when defined; NaN until `length` closed bars have
folded into the seed window. The first defined value lands at
bar index `length` (counted zero-based вҖ” matches the
full-recompute reference in `lib/wilderDirectional.ts`).

## Formula

TR[t]     = max(high вҲ’ low, |high вҲ’ prevClose|, |low вҲ’ prevClose|) ;
upMove    = high[t] вҲ’ high[tвҲ’1] ; downMove = low[tвҲ’1] вҲ’ low[t] ;
+DM       = upMove   > downMove && upMove   > 0 ? upMove   : 0 ;
вҲ’DM       = downMove > upMove   && downMove > 0 ? downMove : 0 ;
seed at bar `length` = simple sum over the seed window ;
smoothed via wilderStep(Оұ = 1/length) thereafter ;
+DI       = 100 В· smoothed+DM / smoothedTR ;
вҲ’DI       = 100 В· smoothedвҲ’DM / smoothedTR ;
DI falls back to 0 when smoothedTR is 0 (matches invinite).

## Warmup

length

## Signature

```ts
function dmi(slotId: string, length: number, opts?: DmiOpts): DmiResult;
```

_The leading `slotId: string` parameter is injected by the chartlang compiler at every callsite вҖ” script authors call `ta.<id>(...)` without it._

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `slotId` | `string` | вҖ” | вҖ” |
| `length` | `number` | вҖ” | вҖ” |
| `opts` | `DmiOpts` | (optional) | вҖ” |

## Returns

`DmiResult`

```ts
// import { ta } from "@invinite-org/chartlang-runtime";
    // const d = ta.dmi("slot", 14);

```
